title: dysoxylum acutangulum
intro: Dysoxylum acutangulum, also known as the Philippine yellow or yellow dysoxylum, is a species of plant native to the Philippines and other parts of Asia, belonging to the family Meliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dysoxylum acutangulum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to protect against microbial infections. Dysoxylum acutangulum is often prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
